properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 27/14
BARENTS SEA
 THE SEISMIC VESSEL GECO EAGLE IS CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY IN BARENTS SEA. 
  IN THE AREA BOUNDED BY:
A. 74-40N 026-36E
B. 74-38N 028-09E
C. 73-22N 025-50E
D. 73-26N 024-26E  
  THE VESSEL IS TOWING 12 SEISMIC STREAMERS WITH THE SPREAD OF 1000 METRES AND LENGTH OF 4 NAUTICAL MILES ASTERN. 

 ALL SHIPS ARE REQUESTED TO GIVE A WIDE BERTH OF 6 NM CPA. 
  GECO EAGLE IS MONITORING VHF CH. 16 AND 73.
